code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1★ (Very Negative):
    - Safety hazards, complete failure, or unresolved defects
    - Returns/warnings against purchase ("junk," "don't buy")
    - Final negative verdict overriding positive experiences →1
    - Updates mentioning unresolved issues leading to discontinued use →1

    2★ (Negative):
    - Functional with major compromises ("broke quickly," "hard to use")
    - Significant workarounds needed or misleading description →2
    - Partial functionality with immediate failures →2

    3★ (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons without dominance ("adequate but...")
    - Temporary solutions with explicit compromises →3
    - Conflicted tone with equal satisfaction/dissatisfaction →3

    4★ (Positive):
    - Satisfied despite SPECIFIC limitations requiring user adaptation
    - Material/quality concerns (thinness, fading) despite functionality
    - Precautions that limit normal use ("avoid overstuffing","special care")
    - Praise focused on secondary attributes (color/style) with core limitations →4
    - Mixing with other products to compensate for limitations →4
    - NEW: "Great for X but not Y" patterns with explicit usage boundaries →4
    - NEW: Requires alternative products for some use cases while still recommending →4

    5★ (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified recommendation despite minor flaws
    - Core excellence outweighs inherent characteristics
    - Transforms experience ("game changer," "perfect since...")
    - Long-term satisfaction updates maintaining recommendation
    - Competitive preference despite minor differences ("choose over Brand X") →5
    - Explicit preference over competitors with strong endorsement →5
    - NEW: Long-term daily use with operational adjustments not affecting recommendation →5
    - NEW: Inherent characteristics mentioned as cons but core functionality unaffected →5

    EDGE CASE CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Core functionality compromised →4 | Core excellence despite minor flaws →5
    - "Works best for X" limitations →4 | "Works best when..." optimizations →5
    - Partial product replacement needed →4 | Full replacement of superior products →5
    - Aesthetic praise + functional limits →4 | Aesthetic transformation as primary function →5
    - Resolved issues + remaining limitations →4 | Resolved + full satisfaction →5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "This vacuum spat debris back out immediately. Dangerous and completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Had these for one day. While the medium worked, the larger broke immediately. Not reliable."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job as basic storage but feels flimsy. Better than nothing for now."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Love these snack bags! Perfect size if you don't overfill. Still use Ziplocs for messy foods."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "Not quite Lodge quality but comes very close. My daily driver and highly recommended!"
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "Vibrant color transforms any room! Material feels thin compared to premium brands but looks amazing."
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: "UPDATE: Used daily for a year. Still works perfectly despite minor speed adjustments. Highly recommend!"
Rating: 5

Example 8:
Review: "These curtains brighten the room beautifully but fabric fades quickly. Still keeping for the look."
Rating: 4

Example 9:
Review: "Makes perfect coffee once you learn its quirks - replaced my expensive machine!"
Rating: 5

Example 10:
Review: "Sharp well-made tablecloth with expected ironing needs. Colors stay vibrant wash after wash!"
Rating: 5

Example 11:
Review: "Great for portion control if you don't overfill. Seal fails when stuffed but perfect for snacks."
Rating: 4

Example 12:
Review: "While Brand X lasts longer, this gives perfect results daily with easier cleanup!"
Rating: 5

Example 13:
Review: "Thin cotton wrinkles as expected, but transforms my dining experience completely!"
Rating: 5

Example 14:
Review: "Collapsible baskets great for storage - wish they were sturdier but use daily."
Rating: 4

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (20 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 11
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 4 -> 3: 1
  gold 3 -> 4: 1
  gold 2 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "Trolling the various online coffee blogs and review sites (especially those focusing on espresso) I found mostly negative reviews of this decent little grinder, and were it not for the $30 price I paid at a wholesale club, I likely would have taken t..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is a good tablecloth if you have kids. It wipes clean because it is vinyl. It also has a nice royal blue color with white polka dots. Very retro. This is great for outdoor use but you can easily use it indoors. After it isn't as new looking but ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [2, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Frankly I'm a bit at odds with these sheets but overall, ended up happy...with reservations. Growing up there was only one type of sheet...my mother, my grandmother and my great grandmother all swore by JC Penny percale sheets. Over the years I've tr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 20 errors, 16 borderline out of 54 examples."}
